mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM place_stats WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND res_id = #{resId} AND is_wish = 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM place_stats WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND res_id = #{resId} AND is_wish = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO place_stats (res_id, user_id, is_wish) VALUES (#{resId}, #{userId}, 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE is_wish = 1
INSERT INTO place_stats (res_id, user_id, rating, content, is_wish) VALUES (#{resId}, #{userId}, #{rating}, #{content}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM place_stats WHERE res_id = #{resId} AND content IS NOT NULL AND content != ''
SELECT user_id as userId, rating, content, created_at as createdAt FROM place_stats WHERE res_id = #{resId} AND content IS NOT NULL AND content != '' ORDER BY created_at DESC
